pages.text: Little Goat went to find the sweetest grass. The sky was blue above. But she did not look up.

blocks.text: Little Goat went to find the sweetest grass.
The sky was blue above. But she did not look up.

pages.text: The river gurgled below. But Little Goat did not listen to its song.

blocks.text: The river gurgled below. But Little Goat did not listen to its song.

pages.text: But Little Goat didn’t answer. A bird called to her, saying, “How do you do?”

blocks.text: A bird called to her, saying, “How do you do?”

pages.text: Story spread 4 She just walked along looking for the sweetest grass.

blocks.text: She just walked along looking for the sweetest grass.

pages.text: As she walked along, Little Goat moved further and further away from Mother Goat.

blocks.text: As she walked along, Little Goat moved further and further away from Mother Goat.

pages.text: Little Goat found the sweetest grass. She ate and ate. She had walked far from Mother Goat.

blocks.text: Little Goat found the sweetest grass. She ate and ate.
She had walked far from Mother Goat.

pages.text: Mother Goat wondered where Little Goat had gone. She looked in the mealie patch, but Little Goat was not there.

blocks.text: Mother Goat wondered where Little Goat had gone.
She looked in the mealie patch, but Little Goat was not there.

pages.text: Mother Goat ran to the river. But Little Goat was not there. “Where are you, Little Goat,” bleated Mother Goat.

blocks.text: Mother Goat ran to the river. But Little Goat was not there.
“Where are you, Little Goat,” bleated Mother Goat.

pages.text: A bird called to Mother Goat. “Little Goat is asleep in the sweet grass across the bridge.”

blocks.text: A bird called to Mother Goat. “Little Goat is asleep in the sweet grass across the bridge.”

pages.text: Mother Goat crossed the bridge, to the sweet grass.

blocks.text: Mother Goat crossed the bridge, to the sweet grass.

pages.text: There she found Little Goat fast asleep.

blocks.text: There she found Little Goat fast asleep.

pages.text: “Wake up, Little Goat,” said Mother Goat gently. “You were lost!” “I wasn’t lost… I have been here all the time!” said Little Goat.

blocks.text: “Wake up, Little Goat,” said Mother Goat gently. “You were lost!”
“I wasn’t lost… I have been here all the time!” said Little Goat.
